name: Brick Fire Tavern
tagline: Neapolitan wood-fired pizza with Hawaiian twists — kalua pig pizza, craft cocktails, and a loyal Kaimuki following.
mustOrder: kalua pig pizza — Hawaiian BBQ meets Neapolitan crust
craft cocktails — the bar program is legit
parking: Street parking on Waialae Ave; side streets toward Wilhelmina Rise
talkStory: Opened around 2016 by pizza obsessive Erick Garza, who spent months sourcing a custom wood-fired oven from Italy and mastering Neapolitan technique before adding Hawaiian twists. The kalua pig pizza — smoky pulled pork on a perfectly charred, leopard-spotted crust — could only come from Hawaii. The craft cocktail program is equally serious. Kaimuki regulars and east Honolulu date-nighters dominate the crowd. Reservations recommended for dinner; Tue-Sun from 11am.
